description: Any injury, illness, or medical event requiring immediate attention.
protocol: Dispatch nearest medical team immediately.
Clear pathway for EMT access.
Notify local hospital if transport is required.
Keep area clear of bystanders.

description: Spills or broken glass posing a safety hazard.
protocol: Cordon off the affected area.
Dispatch janitorial/cleaner team with appropriate cleaning supplies.
If slip hazard, direct foot traffic to alternate routes.

description: Broken seats, faulty lighting, or minor structural damage.
protocol: Cordon off the affected area to prevent injury.
Dispatch maintenance team to assess and repair.
Log the repair status in the facility management system.

description: Excessive crowd density at gates, concourses, or exits.
protocol: Deploy additional guest services staff to manage flow.
Open secondary/overflow gates if available.
Use PA system to direct fans to less crowded areas.
Monitor via CCTV for escalation to crush hazard.

description: Fights, extreme intoxication, or unauthorized pitch access.
protocol: Dispatch rapid response security team.
De-escalate if possible; detain if necessary.
Coordinate with local law enforcement on standby.
Document incident on CCTV.

description: Power loss, exposed wiring, or lighting failure.
protocol: Isolate the electrical hazard and clear the area.
Dispatch Electrician to assess the fault.
Switch to backup generators if stadium lighting is affected.

description: Burst pipes, overflowing toilets, or flooding.
protocol: Shut off the main water valve for the affected sector.
Dispatch Plumber for immediate repairs.
Coordinate with Cleaners for water extraction.

description: POS system down, ticketing scanners offline, or CCTV failure.
protocol: Switch to manual ticketing/cash if applicable.
Dispatch IT Technician to the affected network switch.
Establish radio communication fallback.
